text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'll be racing against Bourbon and McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A little. And maybe just a tiny bit scared too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
What if I lose? What if I don't meet everyone's
expectations? What if I make everyone upset?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
When I get lost in thoughts like that, I can feel
myself freezing up.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But if I put my hand on chest...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I get a warm feeling deep in my heart, and I know
I'll be okay.
choice_data_list:
Get out there and do your best, right up to the
very end.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...You've got it. See you at the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...You've got it. See you at the finish line!
